## Summary

What changed?

## Why

Why is this change needed?

## Validation

- [ ] Changed skills pass `skills-ref validate ./skills/<name>` where available.
- [ ] Installer scripts parse if changed.
- [ ] README and documentation links resolve if changed.
- [ ] No benchmark results are claimed unless measured.

## Scope

- [ ] No unrelated refactors.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or local agent settings.
- [ ] Public documentation remains suitable for a public repository.
